properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`s

properties.name: icon-trailing
properties.description: Indicates the icon affix alignment.

properties.name: aria-current
properties.description: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the element's disabled state. A disabled element will not be included during form submission.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The initial value of the form. This value sets the `value` property only when the `value` property has not been explicitly set.

properties.name: current-value
properties.description: The current value of the element. This property serves as a mechanism to set the `value` property through both property assignment and the .setAttribute() method. This is useful for setting the field's value in UI libraries that bind data through the .setAttribute() API and don't support IDL attribute binding.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the element. This element's value will be surfaced during form submission under the provided name.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Require the field to be completed prior to form submission.

properties.name: autofocus
properties.description: Determines if the element should receive document focus on page load.

properties.name: form
properties.description: The id of a form to associate the element to.

properties.name: formaction
properties.description: See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button

properties.name: formenctype
properties.description: See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button

properties.name: formmethod
properties.description: See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button

properties.name: formnovalidate
properties.description: See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button

properties.name: formtarget
properties.description: See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button

properties.name: type
properties.description: The button type.

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: The connotation the button should have.

properties.name: shape
properties.description: The shape the button should have.

properties.name: appearance
properties.description: The appearance the button should have.

properties.name: size
properties.description: The size the button should have.

properties.name: stacked
properties.description: Indicates the icon is stacked.

properties.name: pending
properties.description: Displays the button in pending state.

properties.name: active
properties.description: Displays the button in active state.

properties.name: dropdown-indication
properties.description: Display a chevron to indicate that the button opens a dropdown.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Indicates the button's label.

properties.name: href
properties.description: Indicates the button's href.

properties.name: download
properties.description: Indicates the button's download.

properties.name: hreflang
properties.description: Indicates the button's hreflang.

properties.name: ping
properties.description: Indicates the button's ping.

properties.name: referrerpolicy
properties.description: Indicates the button's referrerpolicy.

properties.name: rel
properties.description: Indicates the button's rel.

properties.name: target
properties.description: Indicates the target's rel.

events.name: click
events.description: Fires when a pointing device button (such as a mouse's primary mouse button) is both pressed and released while the pointer is located inside the element.

events.name: focus
events.description: Fires when the element receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Fires when the element loses focus.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Fires when a key is pressed.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Fires when a key is released.

events.name: input
events.description: Fires when the value of an element has been changed.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Add an icon to the component
